news: White House signals support for expanded psychedelic research, drawing attention to DFTX's late-stage psychiatric pipeline including DT120 ODT for GAD and MDD.

changes.reason: White House support for psychedelic research reduces regulatory risk for GAD indication
Policy tailwinds for psychedelic therapies improve MDD approval prospects
Strong regulatory support enhances bull case GAD probability
Policy shift increases bull case MDD success probability

news: Nektar announced 52-week topline results from REZOLVE-AA extension showing 27% of participants achieved clinically meaningful hair growth (SALT Score 20), comparable to low-dose treatments for severe alopecia areata.

changes.reason: 52-week data showing 27% achieving SALT Score 20 provides additional durability data supporting probability of success, though efficacy appears modest versus JAK inhibitors
Even in bear case, 52-week durability data reduces risk of complete program failure
Sustained efficacy at 52 weeks supports advancement to Phase 3, though efficacy level suggests modest bull case improvement
